page: Microsoft Azure D2pds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dpdsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an ARM-based architecture powered by a dedicated Microsoft Neoverse-N2 CPU with 2 physical cores and 2 vCPUs operating at 3.4 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core) and 118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities. There are no GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

Benchmark evaluations show average single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 2072.67 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1673.0. Single-threaded gzip compression is a notable strength, reaching 33.01 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory-intensive operations are relatively weak; the stress-ng multi-core score is 4121.76, and the Passmark memory score is rated as poor at 1168.36. Memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks is average at 45.96 GB/sec read, but drops to a weak 21.07 GB/sec for writes.

Given its dedicated ARM cores and balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio, the D2pds_v6 offers a resource-efficient profile for lightweight workloads. It is suited for basic database operations, text processing, and lightweight web serving, where it achieves a static web serving throughput of 4.0 GB/sec. It is less suited for intensive multi-threaded tasks, software compilation, or large-scale LLM inference due to its lower multi-core performance and memory bandwidth constraints.
description: Microsoft Azure D2pds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dpdsv6 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is powered by a dedicated 3.4 GHz ARM-based Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor with 2 physical cores and 2 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM and 118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities, while lacking GPU resources. Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities, highlighted by a strong single-threaded gzip compression speed of 33.01 GB/sec, though multi-core and memory write speeds remain weak. Qualitatively, this server provides a cost-effective option for entry-level workloads that benefit from dedicated ARM architecture. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, text processing, and basic database operations rather than memory-intensive or highly parallelized computing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2pds_v6 is an ARM-based general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Neoverse-N2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 118 GB of local storage for lightweight workloads.

tagline: An ARM-powered general-purpose instance featuring dedicated physical cores and local storage for efficient, lightweight workloads.

Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM and 118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
